nasb.text: They arose and removed the altars which were in Jerusalem; they also removed all the incense altars and cast them into the brook Kidron.

esv.text: They set to work and removed the altars that were in Jerusalem, and all the altars for burning incense they took away and threw into the brook Kidron.

cnv.text: 他們起來，把耶路撒冷城中的祭壇和一切香壇，盡都除去，拋在汲淪溪中。

ccb.text: 他们除去耶路撒冷的祭坛和所有香坛，把它们丢进汲沦溪。
